# Deprecated Mirror

This file is kept only as a compatibility placeholder.

## Active source

- Use `.claude/skills/testing/SKILL.md` as the active testing skill.
- Use `.claude/rules/` for active editor-loaded rules.
- Use `.github/prompts/` only for prompt orchestration content.

## Status

- Do not extend this file.
- Do not treat this file as an active skill source.
- Update `.claude/*` and `AGENTS.md` instead.
